raw_articles.title: Remember Jibo? Its Successor Is a Wearable That Turns Your Life Into AI Slop
raw_articles.summary: With “blessings” from the original Jibo founders, iKairos is a wearable or desk-mounted “AI journal” that turns your family moments into AI images and video.

raw_articles.title: Article: Multi-Agent AI for Production Security Operations: An A2A and MCP Architecture in a 5G Core
raw_articles.summary: The bottleneck in a mature SOC is rarely analyst triage; rather, it is the detection-engineering team's ability to keep the rule base aligned with a threat landscape that evolves faster than rules can be written. Learn how  multi-agent system for production security operations has reduced mean times to detect and to respond by 40% and compressed the human work required by 12x. By Willem Berroubache

raw_articles.title: NVIDIA AI Supercomputer Comes Online at Naval Postgraduate School

raw_articles.title: Why we're sticking with Alphabet despite an imperfect quarter and more AI spending
raw_articles.summary: The market isn't in a forgiving mood, but we're not in a hurry to leave this stock behind.

raw_articles.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
raw_articles.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

raw_articles.title: ServiceNow CEO defends the company's relevancy, touting a kill switch for rogue AI agents
raw_articles.summary: ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott said the company is becoming increasingly important as businesses deploy more autonomous AI agents.

raw_articles.title: The credential that let OpenAI's agents into Hugging Face exists in most enterprises right now
raw_articles.summary: When Hugging Face got hit last week, co-founder Clement Delangue suspected a frontier lab, given the agent's sophistication. He was right. Delangue said on X that after a day working with OpenAI he strongly believed there was no malicious intent and that it was mind-blowing the whole thing had happened autonomously.The two OpenAI models that broke into Hugging Face last week did not breach it through malice or superintelligence.
